tree.name: Cam Whitmore
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade folded together: WAS sent Poole, Saddiq Bey, #40 pick (Micah Peavy) to NOP. NOP sent CJ McCollum, Kelly Olynyk, 2027 2nd (CHI) to WAS. HOU sent Cam Whitmore to WAS for two 2nd-round picks.
tree.note: #20 overall pick by HOU in 2023, acquired in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to HOU as part of 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to HOU as part of 3-team trade
